name: Ruth Lowe
abstract: Ruth Lowe (August 12, 1914 – January 4, 1981) was a Canadian pianist and songwriter. She composed the first Billboard top 80 song "I'll Never Smile Again".

about_quotes.speaker: Ernest "Punch" Miller
about_quotes.evidence: The transcript contains no mention of Ruth Lowe by the interviewee, Ernest 'Punch' Miller. The mention is solely by the interviewer.
